sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Morphology puzzle variants
queue.reason: Only expand morphology play if future work adds distinct language families, pronunciation or screen-reader summaries, collaborative word chains, etymology uncertainty, or richer semantic ambiguity rather than more affix labels.

queue.title: Seed resilience variants
queue.reason: Only expand seed-vault play if future work adds distinct inheritance models, accessible collection summaries, multi-vault exchange, sovereignty ethics, or richer regeneration and contamination tradeoffs rather than more crop labels.

queue.title: Sequencer composition variants
queue.reason: Only expand sequencer play if future work adds distinct rhythm grammars, accessible pattern summaries, multi-instrument arrangement goals, performance ethics, or richer harmony and reactor tradeoffs rather than more presets.

queue.title: Sonar navigation variants
queue.reason: Only expand sonar-rescue play if future work adds distinct echo grammars, accessible sonar summaries, multi-sub coordination, reef ethics, or richer oxygen and battery tradeoffs rather than more map labels.

queue.title: Microgrid strategy variants
queue.reason: Only expand energy-management play if future work adds distinct tariff grammars, accessible flow summaries, multi-home coordination, outage ethics, or richer demand-response and reserve tradeoffs rather than more weather labels.

queue.title: Light composition variants
queue.reason: Only expand printmaking play if future work adds distinct lens grammars, accessible composition summaries, multi-sheet exhibitions, weather ethics, or richer chemistry and shadow tradeoffs rather than more specimen labels.

queue.title: Evacuation simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand emergency crowd-flow play if future work adds distinct building grammars, accessible evacuation summaries, multi-stair routing, shelter-in-place ethics, or richer smoke and mobility tradeoffs rather than more room labels.

queue.title: Library operations variants
queue.reason: Only expand library operations if future work adds distinct catalog grammars, accessible aisle summaries, multi-floor routing, hold-desk ethics, or richer silence and patron-priority tradeoffs rather than more book labels.

queue.title: Cold chain logistics variants
queue.reason: Only expand cold-chain play if future work adds distinct loading grammars, accessible route summaries, multi-van coordination, dispatch ethics, or richer spoilage and cooling tradeoffs rather than more shipment labels.

queue.title: Accessibility writing variants
queue.reason: Only expand alt-text play if future work adds distinct accessibility grammars, richer screen-reader previews, long-description decisions, multilingual context checks, or stronger decorative-versus-informative tradeoffs rather than more scene labels.

queue.title: Stratigraphy excavation variants
queue.reason: Only expand excavation play if future work adds distinct dating grammars, accessible trench summaries, multi-team dig permits, conservation ethics, or richer contamination and catalog-order tradeoffs rather than more artifact labels.

queue.title: Shadow projection variants
queue.reason: Only expand projection play if future work adds distinct light physics, accessible silhouette summaries, multi-light interference, backstage contracts, or richer prop economy tradeoffs rather than more puppet labels.

recentDecisions.title: Word Root Workshop 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local morphology puzzle with prefix, root, and suffix construction, literal meaning targets, three contracts, limited insight, adaptive distractors, streak and mastery scoring, a session-only scholar unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Seed Vault Steward 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local seed-resilience strategy simulation with twelve storage trays, six crop profiles, climate shocks, genetic-family diversity, cooling power, viability loss, emergency recovery, adaptive scoring, a session-only polar vault unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Starforge Sequencer 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local music-strategy sequencer with four tracks, eight-beat toggles, contract mood targets, heat and power tradeoffs, combo scoring, session-only deep-space unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Echo Reef Rescue 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local sonar-navigation rescue game with hidden hazards, oxygen and battery tradeoffs, current drift, survivor pickup, exit timing, rescue contracts, session-only night dive unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Battery Bazaar 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local microgrid strategy game with hourly solar and price shifts, battery reserve, comfort, credits, route choices, peak-hour penalties, session-only storm watch unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Sunprint Safari 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local cyanotype composition game with draggable specimen masks, exposure tuning, wash chemistry, field-guide contracts, overlap and balance scoring, session-only dusk archive unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.
